rows.text:
EXCLUSIVE VIDEO: Disabling fire needed to stop non-compliant vessel with 64 Illegal Aliens onboard!
 
On May 9, our Michel O. Maceda Marine Unit detected and interdicted a non-compliant Yola-type vessel carrying 64 individuals on the western side of Puerto Rico.
 
Marine Interdiction Agents discovered 64 illegal aliens from the Dominican Republic and Haiti onboard. The subjects were transferred onto AMO and PRPD FURA marine assets and transported to the Mayaguez Port of Entry. Border Patrol agents, with support from HSI and PRPD, processed the group at the Ramey Border Patrol Station for removal proceedings. #BorderSecurity
rows.text_resolved:

rows.text:
An alien who is in the U.S. temporarily and wants a Green Card must return to their home country to apply.

This policy allows our immigration system to function as the law intended instead of incentivizing loopholes.

The era of abusing our nation’s immigration system is over.

rows.text:
Irving, Texas, police charged Magdaleno Roman-Rosales, of Mexico, with kidnapping many years ago and he ultimately received a 120-day sentence for unlawful restraint. He was subsequently removed to his home country. At some point, he returned to the United States illegally. 

🔎ICE @ERODallas Fugitive Operations arrested him during a targeted immigration enforcement operation near his residence May 8. During the arrest, he put our officers, the public and himself in danger by attempting to flee.
 
🚨He backed his truck into an ICE vehicle. Before he was able to drive away, skilled ICE officers were able to gain entry into the vehicle. Then, Roman-Rosales refused to exit his truck and had to be physically removed from the cab. He continued to resist his arrest at every step. Thankfully, no one was seriously injured during the operation. 

➡️He will stay in ICE custody pending prosecution.
rows.text_resolved:

LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA: A criminal illegal alien arrested by @HSILosAngeles for producing and possessing child pornography has been SENTENCED to 50 years in prison. The illegal alien, Angel Emilio Rodriguez-Marroquin from Guatemala, featured his own 8-year-old nephew and 8-year-old niece with SPECIAL NEEDS in some of the child pornography he produced. Thanks to our @ICEgov law enforcement officers, this CREEP is behind bars — and, after he serves his time, he will be REMOVED from our country.

Nearly two dozen members of the La Familia Nunca Muere ("The Family Never Dies") criminal organization were charged with racketeering and murder thanks to a Homeland Security Task Force initiative. 14 of the defendants, if convicted, may be eligible for the death penalty. 📰Learn more about the case and ICE’s @HSTFNCC partners: https://go.dhs.gov/5wg 💻Learn more about the task force: http://www.HSTF.gov

Irving, Texas, police charged Magdaleno Roman-Rosales, of Mexico, with kidnapping many years ago and he ultimately received a 120-day sentence for unlawful restraint. He was subsequently removed to his home country. At some point, he returned to the United States illegally. 🔎ICE @ERODallas Fugitive Operations arrested him during a targeted immigration enforcement operation near his residence May 8. During the arrest, he put our officers, the public and himself in danger by attempting to flee. 🚨He backed his truck into an ICE vehicle. Before he was able to drive away, skilled ICE officers were able to gain entry into the vehicle. Then, Roman-Rosales refused to exit his truck and had to be physically removed from the cab. He continued to resist his arrest at every step. Thankfully, no one was seriously injured during the operation. ➡️He will stay in ICE custody pending prosecution.
